raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What's on your mind","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, James?","description":"A safe opener that lets James set context before anything specific is raised.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision impact","name":"How did the promotion decision land for you?","description":"Surfaces his immediate interpretation of the decision without presuming a particular reaction.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ritual shift","name":"What changed for you in the team rituals after that decision?","description":"Looks for the specific behavior change and what it signals day to day.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback heard","name":"What feedback did you actually take in from that process?","description":"Gets at the concrete message he internalized, rather than the formal outcome.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback meaning","name":"What does that feedback mean to you now?","description":"Surfaces his current interpretation and whether it is shaping his choices.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Mentoring fit","name":"What role is the mentoring program playing in your week right now?","description":"Checks whether mentoring is a deliberate investment or something drifting into the center of his time.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Path forward","name":"What feels like the clearest next step for you this quarter?","description":"Pushes toward a concrete forward plan without assuming the answer.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-off check","name":"What are you choosing not to spend time on right now?","description":"Surfaces prioritization and what he is intentionally de-emphasizing.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would help you make the next few weeks feel more deliberate?","description":"Finds the smallest useful support without reopening diagnosis or blame.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Concrete next move","name":"Given what we've covered, what's the first concrete thing you want to move by our next conversation?","description":"Closes by turning the discussion into a specific commitment.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
